import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        print(string.from_byte(b))
      when None
        print("")
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
